title: Senior Software Engineer - Narayana Health Digital - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Narayana Health Digital - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
